PETITION AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS (TRANSACTION ID # 15062104) FILED BY PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORGINATIONS, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING FOR APPROVAL OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED. MR. BEAM WILL BE EXCHANGING THREE YEARS OF HIS NORMAL PAYMENT STREAM IN THE AGGREGATE AMOUNT OF $71,509.24 FOR A SINGLE PAYMENT OF $49,000.00. MR. BEAM'S NORMAL PAYMENT STREAM WILL RESUME JUNE 15, 2018. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Approval Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ERIN SCHARG of Eason & Tambornini, Tel No. (916) 438-1819 appearing telephonically for Petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC;
Atty. EUGENE A. AHTIRSKI, Tel No. (818) 786-2176 appearing telephonically with/for Respondent Josh Beam;
Respondent Josh Beam present.

The Court required parties to appear at hearing. Argument presented by counsel. The Court inquired of Respondent Josh Beam as to his understanding of the terms of the structured settlement. The Court ruled as follows: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is granted. Mr. Beam will be exchanging three years of his normal payment stream in the aggregate amount of $71,509.24 for a single payment of $49,000.00. Mr. Beam's normal payment stream will resume June 15, 2018. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
